feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Emergence of volume-law scaling for entanglement negativity from the Hawking radiation of analogue black holes
entry.content:
Authors: SM Chandran, UR Fischer -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.02075, 2026

Abstract: The quantum information content of Hawking radiation holds the key to understanding black-hole evaporation and the fate of unitarity. Motivated by recent advances in cold-atom experiments, we develop a lattice-regularization approach ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Tracking the emergence of linguistic structure in self-supervised models learning from speech
entry.content:
Authors: MH Kloots, M Bentum, H Mohebbi, C Pouw, G Shen... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: Self-supervised speech models learn effective representations of spoken language, which have been shown to reflect various aspects of linguistic structure. But when does such structure emerge in model training? We study the encoding of a wide ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: No thick atmosphere around TRAPPIST-1 b and c from JWST thermal phase curves
entry.content:
Authors: M Gillon, E Ducrot, TJ Bell, Z Huang, AP Lincowski... - Nature Astronomy, 2026

Abstract: The survival of dense secondary atmospheres around temperate rocky planets orbiting low-mass red dwarfs remains an important open question. Here we show that the thermal phase curves of TRAPPIST-1 b and TRAPPIST-1 c, measured with ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Production of Depolymerised Xylooligosaccharides Via Steam Explosion and Enzymatic Hydrolysis of Brewers' Spent Grain

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: M Dowling

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... And yet, if the process of abiogenesis is as stupendously unlikely as some argue, the Earth may be the only living planet in our universe, making the Earth very special ... I will allow Robert Hazen, a researcher in the field of Origin of Life research to offer a ...

Abstract: Experiments exploring potential emergence - of - life chemistry in a laboratory setting critically depend on simulating realistic early-Earth environments. Such experimental conditions include the implementation of controlled high temperatures ...

entry.title: Valorization of corn husk waste: Xylooligosaccharides as a sustainable prebiotic enhance growth, gut health, and fillet quality in Nile tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus)

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: J Chikwiramakomo, C Gufe, TA Chari, P Jambwa... - Journal of the World ..., 2026

Abstract: Xylooligosaccharides (XOS) are advantageous prebiotics that promote sustainable aquaculture. The growth performance, gut microbiota, and fillet composition of juvenile Nile tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus) were investigated in relation to the ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, brain

entry.title: Climate change effects on biological soil crusts in high-alpine regions: experimental setup and first insights
entry.content:
Authors: J Creve, P Faulhammer, S Herdy, S Maier, M Kim...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: The Alps are warming at approximately twice the global mean rate, accompanied by altered precipitation regimes and rapid snow and ice loss. In high-alpine ecosystems, where low temperatures and short growing seasons constrain the ...

Alert: Gerald Auer (author alert)

entry.title: A research roadmap for assessing the feasibility of warming Mars
entry.content:
Authors: ES Kite, A Essunfeld, MH Hecht, MA Mischna... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: This roadmap outlines research pathways to determine whether Mars could be warmed with non-biological methods. It does not presuppose that warming Mars is desirable; its purpose is to identify what would need to be true for Mars to be ...

Alert: Elsa Ducrot (author alert)

entry.title: Why selection for mitochondrial quality drives the evolution of sexes
entry.content:
Authors: N Lane, A Pomiankowski - Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society B ..., 2026

Abstract: The evolution of sexes is closely tied to uniparental inheritance (UPI) of mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA), where only females transmit mtDNA. Unlike nuclear DNA, mtDNA is highly polyploid and never evolved to be part of meiotic sex ...

Alert: Nick Lane (author alert)

entry.title: BraiNCA: brain-inspired neural cellular automata and applications to morphogenesis and motor control
entry.content:
Authors: L Pio-Lopez, B Hartl, M Levin - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.01932, 2026

Abstract: Most of the Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) defined in the literature have a common theme: they are based on regular grids with a Moore neighborhood (one- hop neighbour). They do not take into account long-range connections and more ...

Tags: brain, Reviewer, too: Complexity

entry.title: High-threshold decoding of non-Pauli codes for 2D universality
entry.content:
Authors: JCM de la Fuente, N Feldman, J Eisert, A Bauer - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.02033, 2026

Abstract: Topological codes have many desirable properties that allow fault-tolerant quantum computation with relatively low overhead. A core challenge for these codes, however, is to achieve a low-overhead universal gate set with limited connectivity. In ...

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)

entry.title: Precision Neuromodulation in Psychiatry: Focus on Temporal Interference Stimulation
entry.content:
Authors: L Albantakis, G Tononi - American Journal of Psychiatry, 2026

Abstract: Transcranial electrical stimulation with temporal interference (TES-TI) is a noninvasive technique that uses multiple high-frequency carrier currents to generate a low-frequency amplitude-modulated envelope, enabling steerable and relatively ...

entry.title: CBRdb: A Cheminformatic Database for Biochemical Reaction Analysis
entry.content:
Authors: L Slocombe, C Millsaps, MR Shahjahan, K Narasimhan...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: We present CBR-db, a database with detailed chemical properties data for biochemical compounds and reactions. We provide the first chemically consistent analyses and detailed chemical properties data for a biologically relevant set of ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: Sara Imari Walker (author alert)

entry.title: Relationship Between Neurologic Symptoms and Signs and FMR1 Genotype in Premutation Carriers
entry.content:
Authors: F Tassone, F Chafota, ME Rentería, RJ Hagerman... - Annals of Clinical and ..., 2026

Abstract: ABSTRACT Background and Objectives Fragile X‐associated Tremor/Ataxia Syndrome (FXTAS) is the most severe late‐onset condition caused by a premutation in the FMR1 gene, characterized by expanded CGG triplet repeats of 55–200 ...

Alert: Nick Martin (author alert)

entry.title: Three Thousand Motion-Confirmed L and T Dwarf Candidates from the Backyard Worlds:~ Planet 9 Citizen Science Project
entry.content:
Authors: AC Schneider, MJ Kuchner, JK Faherty, AM Meisner... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: The Backyard Worlds: Planet 9 citizen science project uses data from the Wide-field Infrared Survey Explorer to detect infrared objects with significant motion. In this work, we present the majority of the L and T dwarf candidates discovered through ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets
